TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Sing-kan, title = Sing-kan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sing-kan} }

S.FORM: == Sing-kan ť¶ôśłĮ == Sing-kan "igu: Hong KongÔľõmikelul misulit:HKÔľŹHKG", pulung pangangan Sing-kun picidekan a sin-cen-cu "igu: Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõmikelul misulit:HKSAR atu Hong Kong SAR, sadayumen singangan " minatu", sabangcalen kungangan " sien-cin", u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo nu tusaay a picidekan nu sin-cen-ci, u Cu-cen-san-ciw-cuo, Aw-kan-aw-ta-wan kitidaan, Ta-cung-hua kitidaan, Ya-tay-ti kitidaan a angangangan a macian, atu nu kitakiday nu macian. kitidaan pasuSing-kan subul, Ciw-lung atu " sin-cie", itida i Kun-tun-sen Cu-cien-kuo walian. lala' nu Sing-kan i nutipan a bayu amisan a dadipasan, miduduc tu amis tu Sen-cen sauwac sibiyaw tu Kun-tun-sen Sen-cen-se, nutipan silaad tu Cu-cen atu Aw-min, masasuayaw atu Cu-hay. ť¶ôśłĮ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Hong KongÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKÔľŹHKG), :Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKSARśąĖHong Kong SAR),Áį°Á®Ī"śłĮ",ťõÖÁ®Ī"ť¶ôśĪü", . itida i Cung-kuo-ta-lu timulan, lala' i nutipan a Tay-pin-yen dadipasan nu makacuwacuwaay a kanatalan nu tatelungan, mangalayaca palaTay- pin-yen atu In-tu-yeng tu caculian. Sing-kan i kitakid nu kainai'an nu " sakalihalay a minatuan nu macian", sapahelak han mamin ku Sing-kan, nu duma a kitakidan nu sakalihalay a tataydaan u " sakalihalay nu minatuan a kitudaan", nuicapiay a minatuaan ku sasangaan tu sakalihalay nu minatu. sumamad, Sing-kan malaCung-kuo timulan atu wali timul nu cuwacuwaay a niyaduan malecad atu kitakidy nu kanatal a angangan nu sasasiwbayan, papapaliyunan tu sasasiwbayan nu tademaw a sakaudip. u Ya-tay kitidaan nu angangan a sasiwbayan , kakaydaan nu caculilan atu gingku. malamalahatay nu Ya-cuo angangan nu sasasiwbayan atu gingku nu tatelungan, kanatal nu sasasiwbayan atu kanatal nu ginginkuan nu tatelungan, sisakatulin tu lalabuay nu tademawan atu nu makacuwacuwaay a kitakidan nu aaedapan, kanatal nu syakay, kanatal a pahikukian atu tatelungan misiwbayay. . kapah hulic, syekay masasungaay, talakaw ku nipikuwan tu lice, pahelak sa misiwbay, sihu kapah ku nipisilud tu hekal nu misiwbayay, pahutin han a misiwbay, mahidatu adidi' ku damsu, madayumay a damsu, hua-ce atu se-hua masacacay. Sing-kan singanganaca tu " Tung-feng-ce-cu" a kanatal tabakiay a maci, "Sing-kan a payaan" u Sing-kan sihu sapisinding nu kiyakuan, micuduh tu Sing-kan u "Ya-cuo-kuo-ci-du-huy". Sing-kun mala i kitakiday u sakapahay nu kasinganganan. Amilika ci-cin-huy namaka cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan katukuh tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan matulin maala i kitakid u sakalihalay nu cin-ci, tusa a malebut tusa a bataan mihcaan mikilul tu Sin-ciw-puo sakatusa ku nikasinganganan. itini i GaWC nipihapuan i kitakid nipisilacan, Sing-kan tu tusa a malebut tusa a bataan nu mihcaan mikilul tu Lun-tun, Niw-ye, u sakatusa nu macian " Alpha+". .ŤÄĆŚú®GaWC "Alpha+"ŚüéŚłā. sakatalaayaw nu wenday a sing-kunť¶ôśłĮŚČćťÄĒŚēŹť°Ć Cung-hua-min-kuo-zen-min-kun-he-kuo mapatideng, u wayway nu Cung-kuo sihu: Sing-kan u lala' nu Cung-kuo, caay palutatengan ku Cung-kuo tu tuluay a nikasasulitan tu cudadan, saan tu kapahay a demiadan masasakamu tu ahicaen mikaykic tu wenday nu Sing-kan, caay henay kalaheci kina kawaw mahida henay. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan tulu a bulad walu a demiad, hina enengay nu Cung-kuo itida i Len-he-kuo ci Hun-hua patayda tu cudad i Len-he-kuo-huy-ce-min-hua tu sakakaay, mihantay tu Sing-kan atu Aw-min " sapihantayaw a nipihapuan", tu tidaay muenengay a niyadu'an a nganganan. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, ci May-li-ha itida: Governor to the Rt. Hon. Sir Alec Douglas-Home, K.T., M.P. tu : cinida "u Sing-kun" a sepat a lasubu nu wang a binacadan atu sihu nu heni miida tu sakatahekal nu tuudan a sapacunus sapikaykic tu sakaudip atu sapicunus a kalisiw, dumasatu amikeda tu kawaw nu Cung-kuo a cen-ce'. amica ku nipiadih tu kapahay tunuduma a tademaw idaw ku yadahay nu balucu', ahicaen caay pakayadah tu nisimsiman nu binacadan kya caay ka lawilaw, saan ahicaen misatalakaw tu nikaudipah, sapipaculiyaw tu ba'ket nu udip, nika saan kaku caay kaw nu aydaay a Sing-kan a nisimsiman. saan ku nuheni itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mihcaan nikangalayan, Sing-kan sakay balucu' nuheni idaw ku tatengaay tu sakay tu nuhenian, u tataydaan nu henia nu sakaudip a tataydaan. 1973ŚĻī1śúą1śó•,ťļ•ÁźÜśĶ©Śú®"Governor to the Rt. Hon. Sir Alec Douglas-Home, K.T., M.P."Á®Ī:"ŚģÉ ." kautiihanťĀéśł°śúü caysiwwalsep mihcaan atu caysiwsiwsep mihcaan nu Sing-kan caysiwwallim mihcaan pitu a bulat cacay a dimiadan, lalabuay nu Cung-kuo atu Sing-kan lima a bataan idaw ku siwa nu tademawan misakaput tu Sing-kan picidekan tu sin-cen niyadu'an hucunu a wi-yen-huy, sabaw tusa a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku walu a demiadan, caysiwwalsiw mihcaan enem a bulat sepat a demiad, Pei-ci mapalekal ku cen-ce-hun-paw, pinaay nu lasubuan a binacadan tayda i patiyamay mapulung masilsil muculil. maadihaca ku mabulaway nu Sing-kan, u zaysang maselep, sihu nu Sing-kan idaw ku nipicuduh tu Sing-kan pahikukian tu kiyaku sapihinum tu balucu'. pitu a bulad, Ing-kuo itidaay i Sing-cia-puo ci Michael Pike namapapatelay atu ci Li-kun-yaw, ci Li-kun-yaw talaayaw musakamu tu sakalahat nu Sing-kun, kinatusa musakamu tu sakay Ing-kuo hidantu ku nipiduduc tu " Cung-Ing nikapulungan a nakamuan" " ma'dem i balucu'", saan Sing-kan a tademaw tu nika amelikan tu nikakapah a min-cu-ce-tu u "nika hemekan a nikatalakawan". 1985ŚĻī7śúą1śó•, Michael Pike ". saan ci Li-kun-yaw, Sing-kan a tademaw caay palutatengan tu Cung-kuo tunikasidaitan, saan ku Cung-kuo caay piala tu canacanan nu masakaputay tu nipiadih u " sapihantayay" a waywayan, kanahatu Sing-kun idaw ku talakaway nu " kaw-tu-ce-ce'", mikainami ku Cung-yen tu canacanan a " nikaliyas, min-cu-ci-cu, tadaudip nu binacadan", saan, pabelien ku duma nu Sing-kan a niyadu'an tu Cung-kuo, Sing-kan a tademaw aminanam tu "sakay ngaay tu Cung-kuo", anu mahicahica ku nabalucuan nuheni. Cung-yen uydasa ku alaen tu nikaydaan nuheni a nisausian, mikelec mihaymaw tu nikatalaayawan, kiya kapah ku culil nu Sing-kan. śĚéŚąÜśěź, . demiadśį£ŚÄô demiad nu Hungkunť¶ôśłĮśį£ŚÄô caay kaw caledesay ku Hungkun, kasaliwsiwan taneng ku caledes sienaw, alahican matulin ku kenukenutan nu pina a lalipayan ku demiad, halehem sengesengetan, hina baliyus tu tabakiay. tu teban nu mihcaan, Tay-pin-yeng malacaledesay, mahiniay nu laludan pasayda ku bali i O-ya talu, Sing-kan siladay tu udad kalasengesengeten a laludan. lalud kasaliwsiwan tusa a puu'an u kabaliyusa, alahican malananum atu lanu' namakabuyu' tu nikacascasan, hina caledes itida, mahida u Sen-ing-sin-seng mala mihcaan nu Sing-kan kinapinaan tu nikataydaan nu caledes alahican matala caledestu, udad hantu mihidatu tu mihmihcaan. sabaw tusa katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcaan tu tusa a bulatan u kasienawan, kalaacakacakan ku sapi', katalakawan nu buyu alahican idaw ku suleda. .

sa*),**"*",**"**", . itida i ¶uŇč-kuo-ta-r~…ĺu timur~…ĺan, r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° i nutipan a taj-pin-j…ôn dadipasan nu maka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kanatar~…ĺan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, maŇčar~…ĺaja ¶a par~…ĺataj- pin-j…ôn atu in-tu-j…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺian. siŇč-kan i kitakid nu kainai Ē~ °an nu " sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a minatuan nu ma ¶ian", sapańß…ôr~…ĺak ńßan mamin ku siŇč-kan, nu duma a kitakidan nu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a tatajdaan u " sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu minatuan a kitudaan", nui ¶apiaj a minatuaan ku sasaŇčaan tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu minatu. sumamad, siŇč-kan mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-kuo timur~…ĺan atu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ nu ° ku damsu, madajumaj a damsu, ńßua- ¶…ô atu s…ô-ńßua masa ¶a ¶aj. siŇč-kan siŇčaŇčana ¶a tu " tuŇč-f…ôŇč- ¶…ô- ¶u" a kanatar~…ĺ tabakiaj a ma ¶i, "siŇč-kan a pajaan" u siŇč-kan sińßu sapisindiŇč nu kijakuan, mi ¶uduńß tu siŇč-kan u "ja- ¶uo-kuo- ¶i-du-ńßuj". siŇč-kun mar~…ĺa i kitakidaj u sakapańßaj nu kasiŇčaŇčanan. amir~…ĺika ¶i- ¶in-ńßuj namaka ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶aan matur~…ĺin maar~…ĺa i kitakid u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu ¶in- ¶i, tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa a bataan mińß ¶aan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sin- ¶iw-puo sakatusa ku nikasiŇčaŇčanan. itini i gaw ¶ nipińßapuan i kitakid nipisir~…ĺa ¶an, siŇč-kan tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa a bataan nu mińß ¶aan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu r~…ĺun-tun, niw-j…ô, u sakatusa nu ma ¶ian " ar~…ĺpńßa+". .**gaw ¶ "ar~…ĺpńßa+"**. sakatar~…ĺaajaw nu w…ôndaj a siŇč-kun****** ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo mapatid…ôŇč, u wajwaj nu ¶uŇč-kuo sińßu: siŇč-kan u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu ¶uŇč-kuo, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku ¶uŇč-kuo tu tur~…ĺuaj a nikasasur~…ĺitan tu ¶udadan, saan tu kapańßaj a d…ômiadan masasakamu tu ańßi ¶a…ôn mikajki ¶ tu w…ôndaj nu siŇč-kan, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i kina kawaw mańßida ńß…ônaj. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺu a d…ômiad, ńßina …ôn…ôŇčaj nu ¶uŇč-kuo itida i r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô-kuo ¶i ńßun-ńßua patajda tu ¶udad i r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô-kuo-ńßuj- ¶…ô-min-ńßua tu sakakaaj, mińßantaj tu siŇč-kan atu aw-min " sapińßantajaw a nipińßapuan", tu tidaaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a nijadu Ē~ °an a ŇčaŇčanan. . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, ¶i maj-r~…ĺi-ńßa itida: go*…ôrnor to tńß…ô *t. ńßon. sir ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ dougr~…ĺas-ńßom…ô, k.t., m.p. tu : ¶inida "u siŇč-kun" a s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu nu waŇč a bina ¶adan atu sińßu nu ńß…ôni miida tu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tuudan a sapa ¶unus sapikajki ¶ tu sakaudip atu sapi ¶unus a kar~…ĺisiw, dumasatu amik…ôda tu kawaw nu ¶uŇč-kuo a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ °. ami ¶a ku nipiadińß tu kapańßaj tunuduma a tad…ômaw idaw ku jadańßaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ańßi ¶a…ôn ¶aaj pakajadańß tu nisimsiman nu bina ¶adan kja ¶aaj ka r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw, saan ańßi ¶a…ôn misatar~…ĺakaw tu nikaudipańß, sapipa ¶ur~…ĺijaw tu ba Ē~ °k…ôt nu udip, nika saan kaku ¶aaj kaw nu ajdaaj a siŇč-kan a nisimsiman. saan ku nuńß…ôni itida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mińß ¶aan nikaŇčar~…ĺajan, siŇč-kan sakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni idaw ku tat…ôŇčaaj tu sakaj tu nuńß…ônian, u tatajdaan nu ńß…ônia nu sakaudip a tatajdaan. *********,****"go*…ôrnor to tńß…ô *t. ńßon. sir ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ dougr~…ĺas-ńßom…ô, k.t., m.p."*:"* ." kautiińßan*** ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan nu siŇč-kan ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺat ¶a ¶aj a dimiadan, r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu ¶uŇč-kuo atu siŇč-kan r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku siwa nu tad…ômawan misakaput tu siŇč-kan pi ¶id…ôkan tu sin- ¶…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an ńßu ¶unu a wi-j…ôn-ńßuj, sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺat tusa a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a d…ômiadan, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺat s…ôpat a d…ômiad, p…ôi- ¶i mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-ńßun-paw, pinaaj nu r~…ĺasubuan a bina ¶adan tajda i patijamaj mapur~…ĺuŇč masir~…ĺsir~…ĺ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. maadińßa ¶a ku mabur~…ĺawaj nu siŇč-kan, u zajsaŇč mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sińßu nu siŇč-kan idaw ku nipi ¶uduńß tu siŇč-kan pańßikukian tu kijaku sapińßinum tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. pitu a bur~…ĺad, iŇč-kuo itidaaj i siŇč- ¶ia-puo ¶i mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ pik…ô namapapat…ôr~…ĺaj atu ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw, ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw tar~…ĺaajaw musakamu tu sakar~…ĺańßat nu siŇč-kun, kinatusa musakamu tu sakaj iŇč-kuo ńßidantu ku nipidudu ¶ tu " ¶uŇč-iŇč nikapur~…ĺuŇčan a nakamuan" " ma Ē~ °d…ôm i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °", saan siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw tu nika am…ôr~…ĺikan tu nikakapańß a min- ¶u- ¶…ô-tu u "nika ńß…ôm…ôkan a nikatar~…ĺakawan". *********, mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ pik…ô ". saan ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw, siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶uŇč-kuo tunikasidaitan, saan ku ¶uŇč-kuo ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu ¶ana ¶anan nu masakaputaj tu nipiadińß u " sapińßantajaj" a wajwajan, kanańßatu siŇč-kun idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu " kaw-tu- ¶…ô- ¶…ô Ē~ °", mikainami ku ¶uŇč-j…ôn tu ¶ana ¶anan a " nikar~…ĺijas, min- ¶u- ¶i- ¶u, tadaudip nu bina ¶adan", saan, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku duma nu siŇč-kan a nijadu Ē~ °an tu ¶uŇč-kuo, siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw aminanam tu "sakaj Ňčaaj tu ¶uŇč-kuo", anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nuńß…ôni. ¶uŇč-j…ôn ujdasa ku ar~…ĺa…ôn tu nikajdaan nuńß…ôni a nisausian, mik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ mińßajmaw tu nikatar~…ĺaajawan, kija kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu siŇč-kan. ***, . d…ômiad** d…ômiad nu ńßuŇčkun**** ¶aaj kaw ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj ku ńßuŇčkun, kasar~…ĺiwsiwan tan…ôŇč ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs si…ônaw, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an matur~…ĺin ku k…ônuk…ônutan nu pina a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan ku d…ômiad, ńßar~…ĺ…ôńß…ôm s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan, ńßina bar~…ĺijus tu tabakiaj. tu t…ôban nu mińß ¶aan, taj-pin-j…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj, mańßiniaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺudan pasajda ku bar~…ĺi i o-ja tar~…ĺu, siŇč-kan sir~…ĺadaj tu udad kar~…ĺas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôt…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺudan. r~…ĺar~…ĺud kasar~…ĺiwsiwan tusa a puu Ē~ °an u kabar~…ĺijusa, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺananum atu r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° namakabuju Ē~ ° tu nika ¶as ¶asan, ńßina ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs itida, mańßida u s…ôn-iŇč-sin-s…ôŇč mar~…ĺa mińß ¶aan nu siŇč-kan kinapinaan tu nikatajdaan nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ar~…ĺańßi ¶an matar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôstu, udad ńßantu mińßidatu tu mińßmińß ¶aan. sabaw tusa katukuńß tu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu tusa a bur~…ĺatan u kasi…ônawan, kar~…ĺaa ¶aka ¶akan ku sapi Ē~ °, katar~…ĺakawan nu buju ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku sur~…ĺ…ôda. .
S.FORM: == Sing-kan ť¶ôśłĮ == Sing-kan "igu: Hong KongÔľõmikelul misulit:HKÔľŹHKG", pulung pangangan Sing-kun picidekan a sin-cen-cu "igu: Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõmikelul misulit:HKSAR atu Hong Kong SAR, sadayumen singangan " minatu", sabangcalen kungangan " sien-cin", u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo nu tusaay a picidekan nu sin-cen-ci, u Cu-cen-san-ciw-cuo, Aw-kan-aw-ta-wan kitidaan, Ta-cung-hua kitidaan, Ya-tay-ti kitidaan a angangangan a macian, atu nu kitakiday nu macian. kitidaan pasuSing-kan subul, Ciw-lung atu " sin-cie", itida i Kun-tun-sen Cu-cien-kuo walian. lala' nu Sing-kan i nutipan a bayu amisan a dadipasan, miduduc tu amis tu Sen-cen sauwac sibiyaw tu Kun-tun-sen Sen-cen-se, nutipan silaad tu Cu-cen atu Aw-min, masasuayaw atu Cu-hay. ť¶ôśłĮ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Hong KongÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKÔľŹHKG), :Hong Kong Special Administrative RegionÔľõÁłģŚĮę:HKSARśąĖHong Kong SAR),Áį°Á®Ī"śłĮ",ťõÖÁ®Ī"ť¶ôśĪü", . itida i Cung-kuo-ta-lu timulan, lala' i nutipan a Tay-pin-yen dadipasan nu makacuwacuwaay a kanatalan nu tatelungan, mangalayaca palaTay- pin-yen atu In-tu-yeng tu caculian. Sing-kan i kitakid nu kainai'an nu " sakalihalay a minatuan nu macian", sapahelak han mamin ku Sing-kan, nu duma a kitakidan nu sakalihalay a tataydaan u " sakalihalay nu minatuan a kitudaan", nuicapiay a minatuaan ku sasangaan tu sakalihalay nu minatu. sumamad, Sing-kan malaCung-kuo timulan atu wali timul nu cuwacuwaay a niyaduan malecad atu kitakidy nu kanatal a angangan nu sasasiwbayan, papapaliyunan tu sasasiwbayan nu tademaw a sakaudip. u Ya-tay kitidaan nu angangan a sasiwbayan , kakaydaan nu caculilan atu gingku. malamalahatay nu Ya-cuo angangan nu sasasiwbayan atu gingku nu tatelungan, kanatal nu sasasiwbayan atu kanatal nu ginginkuan nu tatelungan, sisakatulin tu lalabuay nu tademawan atu nu makacuwacuwaay a kitakidan nu aaedapan, kanatal nu syakay, kanatal a pahikukian atu tatelungan misiwbayay. . kapah hulic, syekay masasungaay, talakaw ku nipikuwan tu lice, pahelak sa misiwbay, sihu kapah ku nipisilud tu hekal nu misiwbayay, pahutin han a misiwbay, mahidatu adidi' ku damsu, madayumay a damsu, hua-ce atu se-hua masacacay. Sing-kan singanganaca tu " Tung-feng-ce-cu" a kanatal tabakiay a maci, "Sing-kan a payaan" u Sing-kan sihu sapisinding nu kiyakuan, micuduh tu Sing-kan u "Ya-cuo-kuo-ci-du-huy". Sing-kun mala i kitakiday u sakapahay nu kasinganganan. Amilika ci-cin-huy namaka cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan katukuh tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan matulin maala i kitakid u sakalihalay nu cin-ci, tusa a malebut tusa a bataan mihcaan mikilul tu Sin-ciw-puo sakatusa ku nikasinganganan. itini i GaWC nipihapuan i kitakid nipisilacan, Sing-kan tu tusa a malebut tusa a bataan nu mihcaan mikilul tu Lun-tun, Niw-ye, u sakatusa nu macian " Alpha+". .ŤÄĆŚú®GaWC "Alpha+"ŚüéŚłā. sakatalaayaw nu wenday a sing-kunť¶ôśłĮŚČćťÄĒŚēŹť°Ć Cung-hua-min-kuo-zen-min-kun-he-kuo mapatideng, u wayway nu Cung-kuo sihu: Sing-kan u lala' nu Cung-kuo, caay palutatengan ku Cung-kuo tu tuluay a nikasasulitan tu cudadan, saan tu kapahay a demiadan masasakamu tu ahicaen mikaykic tu wenday nu Sing-kan, caay henay kalaheci kina kawaw mahida henay. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan tulu a bulad walu a demiad, hina enengay nu Cung-kuo itida i Len-he-kuo ci Hun-hua patayda tu cudad i Len-he-kuo-huy-ce-min-hua tu sakakaay, mihantay tu Sing-kan atu Aw-min " sapihantayaw a nipihapuan", tu tidaay muenengay a niyadu'an a nganganan. . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan cacay a bulad cacay a demiad, ci May-li-ha itida: Governor to the Rt. Hon. Sir Alec Douglas-Home, K.T., M.P. tu : cinida "u Sing-kun" a sepat a lasubu nu wang a binacadan atu sihu nu heni miida tu sakatahekal nu tuudan a sapacunus sapikaykic tu sakaudip atu sapicunus a kalisiw, dumasatu amikeda tu kawaw nu Cung-kuo a cen-ce'. amica ku nipiadih tu kapahay tunuduma a tademaw idaw ku yadahay nu balucu', ahicaen caay pakayadah tu nisimsiman nu binacadan kya caay ka lawilaw, saan ahicaen misatalakaw tu nikaudipah, sapipaculiyaw tu ba'ket nu udip, nika saan kaku caay kaw nu aydaay a Sing-kan a nisimsiman. saan ku nuheni itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mihcaan nikangalayan, Sing-kan sakay balucu' nuheni idaw ku tatengaay tu sakay tu nuhenian, u tataydaan nu henia nu sakaudip a tataydaan. 1973ŚĻī1śúą1śó•,ťļ•ÁźÜśĶ©Śú®"Governor to the Rt. Hon. Sir Alec Douglas-Home, K.T., M.P."Á®Ī:"ŚģÉ ." kautiihanťĀéśł°śúü caysiwwalsep mihcaan atu caysiwsiwsep mihcaan nu Sing-kan caysiwwallim mihcaan pitu a bulat cacay a dimiadan, lalabuay nu Cung-kuo atu Sing-kan lima a bataan idaw ku siwa nu tademawan misakaput tu Sing-kan picidekan tu sin-cen niyadu'an hucunu a wi-yen-huy, sabaw tusa a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku walu a demiadan, caysiwwalsiw mihcaan enem a bulat sepat a demiad, Pei-ci mapalekal ku cen-ce-hun-paw, pinaay nu lasubuan a binacadan tayda i patiyamay mapulung masilsil muculil. maadihaca ku mabulaway nu Sing-kan, u zaysang maselep, sihu nu Sing-kan idaw ku nipicuduh tu Sing-kan pahikukian tu kiyaku sapihinum tu balucu'. pitu a bulad, Ing-kuo itidaay i Sing-cia-puo ci Michael Pike namapapatelay atu ci Li-kun-yaw, ci Li-kun-yaw talaayaw musakamu tu sakalahat nu Sing-kun, kinatusa musakamu tu sakay Ing-kuo hidantu ku nipiduduc tu " Cung-Ing nikapulungan a nakamuan" " ma'dem i balucu'", saan Sing-kan a tademaw tu nika amelikan tu nikakapah a min-cu-ce-tu u "nika hemekan a nikatalakawan". 1985ŚĻī7śúą1śó•, Michael Pike ". saan ci Li-kun-yaw, Sing-kan a tademaw caay palutatengan tu Cung-kuo tunikasidaitan, saan ku Cung-kuo caay piala tu canacanan nu masakaputay tu nipiadih u " sapihantayay" a waywayan, kanahatu Sing-kun idaw ku talakaway nu " kaw-tu-ce-ce'", mikainami ku Cung-yen tu canacanan a " nikaliyas, min-cu-ci-cu, tadaudip nu binacadan", saan, pabelien ku duma nu Sing-kan a niyadu'an tu Cung-kuo, Sing-kan a tademaw aminanam tu "sakay ngaay tu Cung-kuo", anu mahicahica ku nabalucuan nuheni. Cung-yen uydasa ku alaen tu nikaydaan nuheni a nisausian, mikelec mihaymaw tu nikatalaayawan, kiya kapah ku culil nu Sing-kan. śĚéŚąÜśěź, . demiadśį£ŚÄô demiad nu Hungkunť¶ôśłĮśį£ŚÄô caay kaw caledesay ku Hungkun, kasaliwsiwan taneng ku caledes sienaw, alahican matulin ku kenukenutan nu pina a lalipayan ku demiad, halehem sengesengetan, hina baliyus tu tabakiay. tu teban nu mihcaan, Tay-pin-yeng malacaledesay, mahiniay nu laludan pasayda ku bali i O-ya talu, Sing-kan siladay tu udad kalasengesengeten a laludan. lalud kasaliwsiwan tusa a puu'an u kabaliyusa, alahican malananum atu lanu' namakabuyu' tu nikacascasan, hina caledes itida, mahida u Sen-ing-sin-seng mala mihcaan nu Sing-kan kinapinaan tu nikataydaan nu caledes alahican matala caledestu, udad hantu mihidatu tu mihmihcaan. sabaw tusa katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcaan tu tusa a bulatan u kasienawan, kalaacakacakan ku sapi', katalakawan nu buyu alahican idaw ku suleda. .

atu in-tu-j…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺian. siŇč-kan i kitakid nu kainai Ē~ °an nu " sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a minatuan nu ma ¶ian", sapańß…ôr~…ĺak ńßan mamin ku siŇč-kan, nu duma a kitakidan nu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a sapikajki ¶ tu sakaudip atu sapi ¶unus a kar~…ĺisiw, dumasatu amik…ôda tu kawaw nu ¶uŇč-kuo a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ °. ami ¶a ku nipiadińß tu kapańßaj tunuduma a tad…ômaw idaw ku jadańßaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ańßi ¶a…ôn ¶aaj pakajadańß tu nisimsiman nu bina ¶adan kja ¶aaj ka r~…ĺawir~…ĺaw, saan ańßi ¶a…ôn misatar~…ĺakaw tu nikaudipańß, sapipa ¶ur~…ĺijaw tu ba Ē~ °k…ôt nu udip, nika saan kaku ¶aaj kaw nu ajdaaj a siŇč-kan a nisimsiman. saan ku nuńß…ôni itida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mińß ¶aan nikaŇčar~…ĺajan, siŇč-kan sakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni idaw ku tat…ôŇčaaj tu sakaj tu nuńß…ônian, u tatajdaan nu ńß…ônia nu sakaudip a tatajdaan. *********,****"go*…ôrnor to tńß…ô *t. ńßon. sir ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ dougr~…ĺas-ńßom…ô, k.t., m.p."*:"* ." kautiińßan*** ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan nu siŇč-kan ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺat ¶a ¶aj a dimiadan, r~…ĺar~…ĺabuaj nu ¶uŇč-kuo atu siŇč-kan r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku siwa nu tad…ômawan misakaput tu siŇč-kan pi ¶id…ôkan tu sin- ¶…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an ńßu ¶unu a wi-j…ôn-ńßuj, sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺat tusa a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a d…ômiadan, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺat s…ôpat a d…ômiad, p…ôi- ¶i mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-ńßun-paw, pinaaj nu r~…ĺasubuan a bina ¶adan tajda i patijamaj mapur~…ĺuŇč masir~…ĺsir~…ĺ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. maadińßa ¶a ku mabur~…ĺawaj nu siŇč-kan, u zajsaŇč mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, sińßu nu siŇč-kan idaw ku nipi ¶uduńß tu siŇč-kan pańßikukian tu kijaku sapińßinum tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. pitu a bur~…ĺad, iŇč-kuo itidaaj i siŇč- ¶ia-puo ¶i mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ pik…ô namapapat…ôr~…ĺaj atu ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw, ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw tar~…ĺaajaw musakamu tu sakar~…ĺańßat nu siŇč-kun, kinatusa musakamu tu sakaj iŇč-kuo ńßidantu ku nipidudu ¶ tu " ¶uŇč-iŇč nikapur~…ĺuŇčan a nakamuan" " ma Ē~ °d…ôm i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °", saan siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw tu nika am…ôr~…ĺikan tu nikakapańß a min- ¶u- ¶…ô-tu u "nika ńß…ôm…ôkan a nikatar~…ĺakawan". *********, mi ¶ńßa…ôr~…ĺ pik…ô ". saan ¶i r~…ĺi-kun-jaw, siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu ¶uŇč-kuo tunikasidaitan, saan ku ¶uŇč-kuo ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu ¶ana ¶anan nu masakaputaj tu nipiadińß u " sapińßantajaj" a wajwajan, kanańßatu siŇč-kun idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu " kaw-tu- ¶…ô- ¶…ô Ē~ °", mikainami ku ¶uŇč-j…ôn tu ¶ana ¶anan a " nikar~…ĺijas, min- ¶u- ¶i- ¶u, tadaudip nu bina ¶adan", saan, pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku duma nu siŇč-kan a nijadu Ē~ °an tu ¶uŇč-kuo, siŇč-kan a tad…ômaw aminanam tu "sakaj Ňčaaj tu ¶uŇč-kuo", anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nuńß…ôni. ¶uŇč-j…ôn ujdasa ku ar~…ĺa…ôn tu nikajdaan nuńß…ôni a nisausian, mik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ mińßajmaw tu nikatar~…ĺaajawan, kija kapańß ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu siŇč-kan. ***, . d…ômiad** d…ômiad nu ńßuŇčkun**** ¶aaj kaw ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj ku ńßuŇčkun, kasar~…ĺiwsiwan tan…ôŇč ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs si…ônaw, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an matur~…ĺin ku k…ônuk…ônutan nu pina a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan ku d…ômiad, ńßar~…ĺ…ôńß…ôm s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan, ńßina bar~…ĺijus tu tabakiaj. tu t…ôban nu mińß ¶aan, taj-pin-j…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj, mańßiniaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺudan pasajda ku bar~…ĺi i o-ja tar~…ĺu, siŇč-kan sir~…ĺadaj tu udad kar~…ĺas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôt…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺudan. r~…ĺar~…ĺud kasar~…ĺiwsiwan tusa a puu Ē~ °an u kabar~…ĺijusa, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mar~…ĺananum atu r~…ĺanu Ē~ ° namakabuju Ē~ ° tu nika ¶as ¶asan, ńßina ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs itida, mańßida u s…ôn-iŇč-sin-s…ôŇč mar~…ĺa mińß ¶aan nu siŇč-kan kinapinaan tu nikatajdaan nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ar~…ĺańßi ¶an matar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôstu, udad ńßantu mińßidatu tu mińßmińß ¶aan. sabaw tusa katukuńß tu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu tusa a bur~…ĺatan u kasi…ônawan, kar~…ĺaa ¶aka ¶akan ku sapi Ē~ °, katar~…ĺakawan nu buju ar~…ĺańßi ¶an idaw ku sur~…ĺ…ôda. .
